method_summary: The paper uses Deep Variational Information Bottleneck (VIB) to constrain information flow through learned representations for novelty detection.
key_innovation: Application of Deep Variational Information Bottleneck for producing well-calibrated uncertainty estimates in novelty detection.
best_result: 100% AUROC on noise for far-OOD samples using KL divergence
title: VNDUQE: Information-Theoretic Novelty Detection using Deep Variational Information Bottleneck
